mapper.select: select * from ygt_order_candidate_item where ygt_oci_candidate_id = #{candidateId} order by ygt_order_candidate_item_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_order_candidate_item (ygt_oci_candidate_id, ygt_oci_campaign_goods_id, ygt_oci_nx_community_goods_id, ygt_oci_goods_name_snapshot, ygt_oci_quantity, ygt_oci_unit, ygt_oci_price_snapshot, ygt_oci_amount, ygt_oci_remark, ygt_oci_confidence, ygt_oci_manual_adjusted, ygt_oci_create_time, ygt_oci_update_time) values (#{ygtOciCandidateId}, #{ygtOciCampaignGoodsId}, #{ygtOciNxCommunityGoodsId}, #{ygtOciGoodsNameSnapshot}, #{ygtOciQuantity}, #{ygtOciUnit}, #{ygtOciPriceSnapshot}, #{ygtOciAmount}, #{ygtOciRemark}, #{ygtOciConfidence}, #{ygtOciManualAdjusted}, #{ygtOciCreateTime}, #{ygtOciUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_order_candidate_item where ygt_order_candidate_item_id in #{id}
